title: pavonia palmeri
intro: Pavonia palmeri, also known as the Mexican Rosemallow or Wild Rosemallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family, Malvaceae. Traditionally, Pavonia palmeri has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pavonia palmeri include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Pavonia palmeri can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine for its potential therapeutic applications.
